name: Hot Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the cooked chicken, celery, onion, and salad dressing.
2. Cook over medium heat until everything is hot and well combined.
3. Add the walnuts, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir in the grated cheese until melted and mixed throughout.
